footer.ctaTitle: Have a project idea? Let's turn it into a reality.

about.title: Get to know me better
about.subtitle: Building fast, modern digital experiences with clean visual identities.
about.techArsenalSub: A comprehensive suite of tools and languages to build full-stack solutions.
about.reliableSub: Code that stands the test of time.
about.seniorDesc: Leading architectural decisions, mentoring junior developers, and building scalable microservices and complex frontend applications for enterprise clients.
about.midLevelDesc: Transitioned to full-stack roles, specializing in React and Node.js. Built multiple SaaS platforms from scratch and optimized database performance.
about.juniorDesc: Started professional career building responsive landing pages and interactive UI components using HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript.

projects.title: Selected
projects.subtitle: A deep dive into platforms, products, and experiences I've engineered to solve complex problems and delight users.

skills.title: The stack I trust in
skills.subtitle: Building scalable, resilient systems requires the right tools. Here is the curated set of technologies I leverage daily, honed over 10+ years of full-stack development.

blog.title: Insights on
blog.subtitle: Tutorials, architectural deep-dives, and reflections on building scalable digital products.

services.frontendDesc: Producing scalable, maintainable, and well-documented code following modern best practices and design patterns.
services.mobileDesc: Optimizing for speed and seamless UX. Fast load times, smooth animations, and solid SEO fundamentals.
services.consultingDesc: Taking ideas from zero to production. Covering concept, database design, API integration, and deployment.
services.title: Why choose me?
services.description: I prioritize building highly performant applications that offer great user experiences and maintainable codebases.

services.title: Services
services.description: I offer a comprehensive range of development services to bring your digital products to life.
services.frontendDesc: Building responsive, accessible, and highly interactive user interfaces using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.
services.backendDesc: Designing scalable APIs, robust database architectures, and secure server-side logic using Node.js.
services.mobileDesc: Creating cross-platform mobile experiences that feel native and perform beautifully on iOS and Android.
services.consultingDesc: Providing architectural guidance, code reviews, and performance optimization strategies for complex applications.

testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonials.description: Don't just take my word for it. Here's what some of my clients have to say about our collaboration.
testimonials.quote1: Mohamed delivered an exceptional dashboard that completely transformed how we analyze our data. His attention to detail and UI/UX design is unmatched.
testimonials.quote2: Working with Mohamed was a breeze. He understood our complex requirements and built a scalable Next.js application that exceeded our expectations.

about.basedInSub: Available for in-person meetings in the MENA region.
about.remoteSub: Experienced in adapting to different time zones and asynchronous communication.
about.techArsenalSub: The tools and technologies I use daily to build exceptional digital products.
about.reliableSub: Consistently meeting deadlines and producing high-quality, bug-free code.
about.performanceSub: Building fast, efficient, and scalable applications that grow with your needs.
about.communicationSub: Keeping you informed at every step, translating technical jargon into business impact.
about.juniorDesc: Began professional journey, focusing on core web technologies.
about.midLevelDesc: Expanded expertise into mobile development and cloud infrastructure.
about.seniorDesc: Leading complex system architectures and mentoring development teams.
